mapper.insert: INSERT INTO expenses (project_participant_id, expense_date, transport_method, transport_route, transport_distance_km, transport_cost, accommodation_cost, miscellaneous_cost, receipt_date) VALUES (#{projectParticipantId}, #{expenseDate}, #{transportMethod}, #{transportRoute}, #{transportDistanceKm}, #{transportCost}, #{accommodationCost}, #{miscellaneousCost}, #{receiptDate})
